emails.subject: Another two guests?
emails.body: Another two guests? We have had an overwhelmingly favorable response to the May19 Church Gourmet. I have already added one extra party to accomodate the additional guests. We now have 48 participants and need a place at the table for 2 or 4 of them. Is there any way that Tana or Kleta could add a couple of chairs to their tables to squeeze in two more? Poor Lisa Kennedy has found herself with a potential for 16 guests in her townhouse and is not sure where they will all fit. If Henry and I could move to Tana's house and Kleta could pick up Dan and Andrea Goodwin, this would solve the problem. This is a great problem to have more than half of the participants in the dinner are new members at CTK I hope you can help out. ALG P.S. We can loan you extra chairs if necessary..

emails.subject: Re: Another two guests?
emails.body: Re: Another two guests? I would love to pick up you and Henry! Alicia Goodrow/ENRON@enronXgate 05/07/2001 09:21 AM
